events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) field review where everything appears correct: expected unit in intended location, nameplates and orientation marks readable, no damage, matches referenced detail for the rough-complete stage. No defects or hazards are mentioned. Reference: OSHA 1910.147.

This is a pass condition. No component conditions flagged. Risk is low. Work stage is rough-complete. Percent complete maybe around 80-90% since roughed in but not closed out. Let's say 85. Confidence high, maybe 0.9. No findings or actions needed. Rationale: item matches detail, no damage, nameplates readable, compliant for stage.
